title: Crown Retail Core Emulsion Silk Magnolia 2.5 L
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
description: Silk emulsion has a subtle surface shine that can be wiped clean easily. All Crown Matt and Silk emulsions are Breatheasy 99% Solvent free. For a perfect finish: Stir paint thoroughly before use and apply nice and evenly using a brush or roller (a medium sized roller is best for smooth surfaces). 2.5 Litres of Crown emulsion will cover 35.sq metres on a smooth surface. The pack must be stored in a secure upright position, in a safe and dry place. So much more than just being visual, colour can also be a trigger for your emotions--both past and present. Once you understand the colours that inspire you with passion, calm, nostalgia or happiness, use them in your home to turn it into a vivid expression of yourself. Crown Paints separate colours into categories to help you understand what colour you want to feel so you can choose which colours will create that mood in your home. Cream hints of richness and smoothness. A cream room is a natural haven from the hectic world outside and will make any living area a relaxed space that is luxurious and yet understated. Use cream in your bedroom and wake up every morning to warm buttered toast in bed. Crown has had a passion for making paint since 177-- we pour a wealth of knowledge in to every single can. Transform your home with beautiful colour and a quality paint finish with Crown Paints. All Crown Matt and Silk Emulsions are Breatheasy 99% solvent free--virutally odour free, allowing you to return to your room quicker. With over 100 years' experience, we have many products formulated for your personal decorating needs. From fashion loving Flat Matt Emulsion to Kitchen and Bathroom paint with Mouldguard or even Solo One-coat, your decorating can be as fun or as fast as you choose. At Crown our knowledge and passion for making paint means we understand the importance of good preparation to achieve the best finished results. Whether it's on walls, ceilings, wood or metal, our primers, undercoats and basecoats will help you create a fabulous finish with longer lasting results. Start your decorating from the top down and don't neglect your ceilings.
